title: Replication package: Mapping reported state aid into European production networks
author: Under blind review
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This archive contains the blind replication package for a quantitative study of how reported State aid is embedded in European production networks using an origin-country-consistent multi-regional input-output framework. The package reproduces the baseline analysis built on   origin_network.toml  , including data ingestion, cleaning, concordance and allocation steps, exposure construction, estimation, robustness diagnostics, and rendering of tables and figures. 
 The archive includes source code, configuration files, raw-data provenance documentation, concordance inventories, constructed intermediate and final datasets, codebooks, run-provenance summaries, and rendered outputs. It also includes the full monitoring outputs, inference diagnostics, and robustness maps used to audit completeness. The package is intentionally blind and does not include manuscript files. 
 Some raw inputs are archived directly in the package where redistribution is feasible and useful for replication. OECD ICIO raw bundle ZIP files are not redistributed in the archive; instead, the package provides provenance documentation and instructions for obtaining them separately and placing them in the expected raw-data location. The package root contains a one-command replication script and a start-here guide.
